prompt: Create a tall vertical dark fantasy anime illustration of a manic gothic battle maid in an extreme low-angle close-up, as if she is lunging toward the viewer inside a ruined cathedral. The character is a young anime girl with pale skin, messy silver-gray hair, a frilled maid headdress, a black gothic maid dress with ruffled white apron pieces, leather straps, dark gauntlet-like sleeves, and heavy ornate armor on one shoulder. Show exactly one character, exactly two glowing red eyes with tiny mechanical starburst pupils, exactly two visible hands gripping exactly one enormous double-bladed battle axe or halberd raised diagonally above her head. Her expression is feral and ecstatic: wide open mouth, sharp vampire-like teeth, crazed smile, intense forward gaze. The weapon should be oversized, black steel, chipped, circular mechanical details near the axe head, and covered in scratches. Compose the image with dynamic foreshortening: the face and armored shoulder dominate the center, the axe head fills the upper-right, the shaft cuts diagonally from lower-left to upper-right, and her skirt and straps recede downward. Background: a monochrome ruined Gothic cathedral with tall arches and a large circular stained-glass rose window visible in the lower-left distance, fractured stone, rubble, and vertical architectural lines. Visual style: highly detailed black-and-white manga rendering, gritty ink wash, sharp line art, heavy contrast, splattered paint texture, chaotic brush strokes, cracked surfaces, horror-action energy. Color palette is almost entirely grayscale and black, with only three accent colors: vivid crimson red glowing in the eyes and blood-like splatters, small electric blue paint flecks near the weapon and lower clothing, and sparse gold-orange sparks or splashes near the lower-right. Add red splatter across the face, armor, weapon, and background, but keep the character readable. Use cinematic dramatic lighting, glossy wet highlights on black metal, deep shadows, and no clean flat colors. No text, no watermark, no border.
